text.title: Role Cheatsheet Generator Failure Modes
text.summary: Three antipatterns when adopting the generator. Each pairs symptom + root-cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Cheatsheet lists "architect-review-template" under software-architect because slug contains "architect"; methodology is actually QA-owned.
antipattern.root-cause: Generator inferred role from slug substring; bypassed role-tag list.
antipattern.fix: Enforce r3-role-tag-source-of-truth; reject any inference path other than frontmatter `role:` tag.

antipattern.symptom: Team edits the generated cheatsheet to fix a typo; next regenerate wipes the edit.
antipattern.root-cause: No `do-not-edit` header or no overrides file.
antipattern.fix: Add `# generated-do-not-edit` header (r4); move pinned items into `cheatsheet-<role>.overrides.md`.

antipattern.symptom: Solo-tier org cheatsheet links to a pro-tier methodology; team clicks; gets 403.
antipattern.root-cause: Generator did not filter by tier-manifest snapshot.
antipattern.fix: Enforce r2-tier-gated; reject cheatsheet at generate-time when any entry.tier > org tier.
